headline: Home Depot's FY26 Earnings Outlook: Signs of a Turnaround?
summary: HD's positive comps, Pro momentum and digital growth signal early stabilization despite housing pressures and softer discretionary demand.

headline: Lifetime Brands Drives International Growth Through National Accounts
summary: LCUT international sales grow 10.6% y/y in Q1'26 as national retail account wins, margin gains and restructuring efforts support growth plans.
